M-030.NAME: awg-stealth-obfuscation
M-030.owns: deploy-time AmneziaWG stealth profile generation, validation, rendering, and parity between RU client-facing configs and RU-DE relay configs

exports.type-AWGObfuscationProfile: Typed profile containing Jc, Jmin, Jmax, S1, S2, H1, H2, H3, H4
exports.fn-generate-awg-profile: Generate bounded random stealth parameters from the approved AmnezWG reference ranges
exports.fn-parse-awg-profile: Parse an existing awg config into a validated profile for upgrade-safe preservation
exports.fn-render-awg-profile: Render profile lines for server, relay, backend env, and client config outputs
exports.fn-validate-awg-profile-pair: Verify both endpoints of a link use identical obfuscation parameters before service restart

profiles.profile-client: CLIENT_PROFILE applies to external clients and RU awg0.
profiles.profile-relay: RELAY_PROFILE applies to RU awg-client and DE awg0.

implementation-status.local: Implemented profile generation/parsing/rendering, deploy helper integration, backend CLIENT_PROFILE loading, nullable encrypted PSK support, and static/unit verification.
implementation-status.blocked: Live RU/DE deploy, STEALTH_ROTATE=1 rotation, RU-DE handshake, client handshake, and DE egress gates require explicit operator approval.

M-030.hotspot: H-017: Changing AWG obfuscation or UDP port invalidates existing client configs unless rotation is explicit
